'''âdh-th-b-s''' ('''kadhathbesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exclaim|exclaim]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exclaim|exclaim]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-th-b-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadhathbesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhathbesoko|thidhathbesoko]] || [[word:jidhathbesoko|jidhathbesoko]] || [[word:shidhathbesoko|shidhathbesoko]] || [[word:kidhathbesoko|kidhathbesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhathbesoko|thuthudhathbesoko]] || [[word:jujudhathbesoko|jujudhathbesoko]] || [[word:shushudhathbesoko|shushudhathbesoko]] || [[word:kukudhathbesoko|kukudhathbesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhathbesoko|thudhathbesoko]] || [[word:judhathbesoko|judhathbesoko]] || [[word:shudhathbesoko|shudhathbesoko]] || [[word:kudhathbesoko|kudhathbesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhathbesoko|thodhathbesoko]] || [[word:jodhathbesoko|jodhathbesoko]] || [[word:shodhathbesoko|shodhathbesoko]] || [[word:kodhathbesoko|kodhathbesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhathbesoko|thodhathbesoko]] || [[word:jodhathbesoko|jodhathbesoko]] || [[word:shodhathbesoko|shodhathbesoko]] || [[word:kodhathbesoko|kodhathbesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhathbesoko|thĂŠdhathbesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhathbesoko|jĂŠdhathbesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhathbesoko|shĂŠdhathbesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhathbesoko|kĂŠdhathbesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhathbesoko|thadhathbesoko]] || [[word:jadhathbesoko|jadhathbesoko]] || [[word:shadhathbesoko|shadhathbesoko]] || [[word:kadhathbesoko|kadhathbesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhathbesoko|thadhathbesoko]] || [[word:jadhathbesoko|jadhathbesoko]] || [[word:shadhathbesoko|shadhathbesoko]] || [[word:kadhathbesoko|kadhathbesoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
